ir_night_1024x747.provenance: Synthetic P1 supplement. Not CCT-20, not a photograph, never training data. Exists because the real golden corpus is all landscape and cannot exercise this branch.
ir_night_1024x747.why: grayscale-looking IR: three equal low-contrast channels, ordinary night input

odd_1023x767.why: odd dimensions: rounding and floor-divided pads

portrait_747x1024.provenance: Synthetic P1 supplement. Not CCT-20, not a photograph, never training data. Exists because the real golden corpus is all landscape and cannot exercise this branch.
portrait_747x1024.why: portrait: pad_left > 0, the branch no real CCT fixture reaches

square_512x512.why: square: both pads zero on one axis exactly

tiny_100x80.why: smaller than the target: the upscale path

purpose: P1 preprocessing-parity coverage the real golden corpus cannot give
